summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tramilex immigration document management system iteration 2. All 4 new features working correctly: document categories, admin upload to client profiles, bulk ZIP download, and audit log tracking. Backend APIs (25/25) and frontend features fully functional.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@tramilex.com / Admin123! still works
Client registration and login functionality maintained
Document upload with category selection (identificacion, residencia, trabajo, resolucion, contrato, fiscal, otros)
Category sent as Form field alongside file upload using multipart/form-data
Client dashboard shows category and uploaded_by columns in documents table
Admin login and access to clients list maintained
Admin can view client detail with category column in documents table
Admin can upload documents to client profile via POST /api/clients/{client_id}/documents/upload
Admin uploaded documents show uploaded_by=admin in client detail view
Bulk download all client documents as ZIP via GET /api/clients/{client_id}/download-all
Audit log page at /admin/audit shows all actions with proper filtering
Audit log API GET /api/audit returns logs with pagination (page, limit parameters)
Audit logs created for: document_uploaded, document_deleted, document_status_changed, client_deleted, admin_uploaded_document, smtp_updated, bulk_download
Navigation to /admin/audit from sidebar works correctly
Document status change still works with audit logging
All 6 document categories properly validated and stored
Admin upload section with category selection dropdown functional
Bulk download button present and accessible in client detail view
Client dashboard category selection dropdown working
JWT authentication and authorization maintained

success_percentage.backend: 100% (25/25 API endpoints working including 8 new feature endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI flows, new features, and integrations working)
